Task Name: SPRINT 1 — ML INFRASTRUCTURE & EXPERIMENT SETUP
Provision Azure ML Workspace (Enterprise / MLflow Native / Unity Catalog)
Observations & Analysis: Central ML hub. Experiment tracking / model registry / compute management. Managed Identity for ADLS/SQL access.

Task Name: Provision ML Training Cluster (DS13_v2 / Auto 0-8 nodes / Low-priority)
Observations & Analysis: Training compute for daily 02:00 UTC jobs. 3-hr window. 4-8 parallel jobs. Idle timeout: 1200s. Low-priority for 60% cost savings.

Task Name: Provision ML Compute Instances (DS3_v2 x2 / DS4_v2 x1 for notebooks)
Observations & Analysis: 3 dev instances for ML engineers. Jupyter/VS Code. Auto-shutdown 60min. 3rd instance (DS4) for PS1/PS5 heavy workloads.

Task Name: Configure MLflow tracking server (SQLite local → Azure SQL production)
Observations & Analysis: Local: sqlite:///mlruns/mlflow.db. Prod: Azure SQL backend + ADLS artifact store. Artifact location: abfss://models@storage/mlflow/

Task Name: Create 6 MLflow experiments (PS1-PS5 + Drift_Detection)
Observations & Analysis: Experiments: PS1_Failure_Prediction / PS2_Error_Pattern_Recognition / PS3_Root_Cause_Analysis / PS4_Anomaly_Detection / PS5_SLA_Risk_Prediction / Drift_Detection

Task Name: Configure MLflow auto-logging (params / metrics / artifacts / models)
Observations & Analysis: mlflow.sklearn.autolog() / mlflow.xgboost.autolog(). Custom artifact logging for plots / CSVs / SHAP values. Run naming convention.

Task Name: Set up ML environment definitions (conda.yml / requirements.txt / Docker base)
Observations & Analysis: 5 registered environments: mars-env-ps{1-5}. Version-pinned packages. Linked to ACR Docker images. Reproducibility guarantee.

Task Name: Configure ML model accuracy gates (>90% overall / >92% critical devices)
Observations & Analysis: Automated validation script. Checks AUC/F1/Precision/Recall against thresholds. AUTO-REJECT if accuracy<90%. Alert on failure.

Task Name: Set up ML experiment naming conventions and tagging standards
Observations & Analysis: Run naming: PS{n}_{Model}_{timestamp}. Tags: model_type / dataset_version / feature_count / data_quality_score / trigger_reason.

Task Name: SPRINT 2 — PS-1 FAILURE PREDICTION (Full Development)
PS-1: Define target variable (device_failed binary label from maintenance records)
Observations & Analysis: Binary classification: 1=failed within 7 days / 0=no failure. Join Gold features with maintenance_events. Handle class imbalance (expected 3-5% positive).

Task Name: PS-1: Perform exploratory data analysis (EDA) on Gold features
Observations & Analysis: Distribution analysis / correlation matrix / target balance check / outlier detection / missing value patterns. Output: EDA_report.html notebook.

Task Name: PS-1: Feature selection — filter methods (variance threshold / mutual information)
Observations & Analysis: Remove zero-variance features. Mutual information ranking. Select top 20-30 from 85-120 candidates. Log selected features to MLflow.

Task Name: PS-1: Implement train/test split (80/20 time-based stratified)
Observations & Analysis: Time-based split (no data leakage). Stratify by failure label. Train: days 1-24 / Test: days 25-30. Log split statistics to MLflow.

Task Name: PS-1: Handle class imbalance (SMOTE / class_weight / threshold tuning)
Observations & Analysis: SMOTE oversampling on training set only. Compare: SMOTE vs class_weight='balanced' vs threshold optimization. Log best strategy.

Task Name: PS-1: Feature scaling and preprocessing pipeline (StandardScaler / OrdinalEncoder)
Observations & Analysis: sklearn Pipeline: StandardScaler for numerics / OrdinalEncoder for categoricals. Save fitted preprocessor as artifact. Training-serving consistency.

Task Name: PS-1: Train Random Forest (n_estimators=500 / max_depth=15 / min_samples=10)
Observations & Analysis: RF baseline. GridSearchCV: n_estimators=[300/500/700] / max_depth=[10/15/20] / min_samples_leaf=[5/10/20]. 5-fold CV. Ensemble weight: 0.45.

Task Name: PS-1: Train XGBoost (n_estimators=300 / learning_rate=0.05 / max_depth=12)
Observations & Analysis: XGBoost with early stopping. GridSearchCV: lr=[0.01/0.05/0.1] / max_depth=[8/10/12] / subsample=[0.8/1.0]. eval_metric=logloss. Weight: 0.35.

Task Name: PS-1: Train CatBoost (iterations=1200 / depth=8 / learning_rate=0.03)
Observations & Analysis: CatBoost native categorical handling. GridSearchCV: iterations=[800/1200/1500] / depth=[6/8/10] / l2_reg=[1/3/5]. GPU optional. Weight: 0.20.

Task Name: PS-1: Optimize ensemble weights via grid search on validation set
Observations & Analysis: Grid search over weight combinations (w1+w2+w3=1). Optimize for AUC on validation fold. Current best: 0.45/0.35/0.20. Log optimal weights.

Task Name: PS-1: Calculate confusion matrix / precision / recall / F1 / AUC / avg_precision
Observations & Analysis: Full classification report on test set. ROC curve + PR curve as artifacts. Target: AUC>0.95 / F1>0.60 / Precision>0.70. Log all metrics.

Task Name: PS-1: Generate ROC curve / PR curve / confusion matrix plots
Observations & Analysis: matplotlib plots: cm_{model}.png / roc_curve.png / pr_curve.png. Log as MLflow artifacts. Compare 3 models side-by-side.

Task Name: PS-1: Generate feature importance plots (per model + ensemble)
Observations & Analysis: feature_importance_{model}.png for RF/XGB/CB. Ensemble-weighted importance. Top 15 features bar chart. Log as artifacts.

Task Name: PS-1: Implement threshold optimization (maximize F1 / business cost matrix)
Observations & Analysis: Sweep threshold 0.1→0.9. Plot F1 vs threshold. Business cost: false_negative=10x cost of false_positive. Optimal threshold likely 0.35-0.50.

Task Name: PS-1: Apply accuracy gate validation (>90% required / AUTO-REJECT if fail)
Observations & Analysis: Automated check: if accuracy<0.90 → REJECT + alert. If AUC<0.90 → REJECT + alert. Log pass/fail decision. Block deployment on failure.

Task Name: PS-1: Register champion model in MLflow (Production stage)
Observations & Analysis: Register best model (highest AUC). Stage: None→Staging→Production. Log: model_uri / accuracy / feature_names / training_data_hash.

Task Name: PS-1: Save model artifacts (pkl / feature_names / scaler / threshold)
Observations & Analysis: Save: model.pkl / scaler.pkl / feature_names.json / optimal_threshold.json / champion_metrics.json. Versioned in MLflow artifacts.

Task Name: SPRINT 3 — PS-2 & PS-3 (Error Patterns + Root Cause)
PS-2: Prepare error log data (co-occurrence matrix from Silver error_logs)
Observations & Analysis: Transform error_logs into device-level error baskets. Binary encoding: device x error_type. Time-windowed (7d/30d). Filter noise (count<2).

Task Name: PS-2: Train Apriori association rules (min_support=0.05 / min_confidence=0.3)
Observations & Analysis: mlxtend FP-growth (faster than Apriori). Rules: {E001_NFC_TIMEOUT}→{E003_NETWORK_LOSS}. Metrics: support / confidence / lift / conviction.

Task Name: PS-2: Filter and rank significant rules (lift>1.0 / conviction>1.2)
Observations & Analysis: Remove spurious rules (lift<1.0 means negative correlation). Rank by lift*confidence. Top 20 rules as actionable patterns.

Task Name: PS-2: Generate association rules visualization (network graph / heatmap)
Observations & Analysis: association_rules_plot.png: scatter (support vs confidence colored by lift). Network graph of error co-occurrence. Log as artifacts.

Task Name: PS-2: Build Markov Chain transition matrix (12 error states)
Observations & Analysis: 12 error types as states. P(next_error | current_error). Normalize rows to sum=1. Identify absorbing states (errors that don't recover).

Task Name: PS-2: Calculate stationary distribution and escalation probabilities
Observations & Analysis: Stationary distribution: long-run error type probabilities. Escalation: P(LOW→MEDIUM→HIGH→CRITICAL). Identify cascade sequences.

Task Name: PS-2: Generate Markov heatmap and transition diagram
Observations & Analysis: markov_heatmap.png: seaborn heatmap of transition probabilities. Highlight top 10 transitions. Log transition_matrix.csv as artifact.

Task Name: PS-2: Log all PS-2 metrics to MLflow (num_rules / avg_confidence / max_lift / escalations)
Observations & Analysis: MLflow run: PS2_Error_Patterns. Metrics: num_association_rules / avg_confidence / max_lift / num_error_states / total_escalations.

Task Name: PS-3: Run SHAP TreeExplainer on PS-1 champion model
Observations & Analysis: shap.TreeExplainer(champion_model). Calculate SHAP values for entire test set. Memory-intensive — use DS4_v2 compute.

Task Name: PS-3: Generate global SHAP summary plot (beeswarm / bar)
Observations & Analysis: shap_summary.png (beeswarm): red=high value→failure / blue=low value→normal. shap_bar.png: mean |SHAP| ranking. Top 10 features.

Task Name: PS-3: Generate SHAP dependence plots for top 5 features
Observations & Analysis: shap_dependence_{feature}.png for each of top 5 features. Shows non-linear relationships. Color by interaction feature.

Task Name: PS-3: Generate local SHAP waterfall explanations (per-device)
Observations & Analysis: shap_local_explanation.csv: per-device SHAP breakdown. Enables 'Device X fails because signal_strength=-2.1 + error_count=+1.5'. Actionable insights.

Task Name: PS-3: Export SHAP importance CSV (feature / mean_abs_shap / rank)
Observations & Analysis: shap_importance.csv: feature_name / mean_abs_shap / rank. Feeds React dashboard PS-3 panel. Compare against RF feature_importance.

Task Name: PS-3: Run causal inference analysis (DoWhy / causal-learn)
Observations & Analysis: 5 treatments: error_count / temperature_c / signal_strength_dbm / memory_usage_pct / age_days. ATE estimation. Significant=p<0.05.

Task Name: PS-3: Generate causal graph and export causal_results.csv
Observations & Analysis: causal_results.csv: treatment / hypothesis / ate / significant. Causal graph visualization. Log all to MLflow PS3_Root_Cause experiment.

Task Name: PS-3: Log all PS-3 metrics to MLflow (top_feature_shap / num_significant_causes)
Observations & Analysis: MLflow run: PS3_Root_Cause. Metrics: top_feature_shap / num_significant_treatments. Artifacts: all SHAP plots + CSVs.

Task Name: SPRINT 4 — PS-4 & PS-5 (Anomaly Detection + SLA Risk)
PS-4: Select anomaly detection features (11 operational metrics)
Observations & Analysis: Feature subset: signal_strength / temperature / response_time / network_latency / power_voltage / memory / cpu / error_count / tap_success / uptime / health_score.

Task Name: PS-4: Fit StandardScaler on training data and save scaler artifact
Observations & Analysis: StandardScaler.fit(X_train). Save scaler.pkl for inference consistency. Transform test data with fitted scaler (no data leakage).

Task Name: PS-4: Train Isolation Forest (contamination=0.08 / n_estimators=100)
Observations & Analysis: IsolationForest with contamination=0.08 (expected anomaly rate). Hyperparameter search: contamination=[0.05/0.08/0.10] / n_estimators=[100/200].

Task Name: PS-4: Calculate anomaly scores and identify anomalous features per device
Observations & Analysis: decision_function() scores. For anomalies: compare feature values vs population mean. anomaly_feature_diff.csv: feature / anomaly_mean / normal_mean / pct_diff.

Task Name: PS-4: Generate Isolation Forest results visualization (scatter / distribution)
Observations & Analysis: isolation_forest_results.png: anomaly score distribution with threshold line. Scatter plot: top 2 PCA components colored by anomaly label.

Task Name: PS-4: Implement SPC control charts for 6 key features
Observations & Analysis: X-bar charts: UCL = mean + 3*sigma / LCL = mean - 3*sigma. Features: signal / temperature / response_time / error_count / tap_success / health_score.

Task Name: PS-4: Calculate SPC violations (outside limits) and warnings (2-3 sigma zone)
Observations & Analysis: Violations: value > UCL or < LCL. Warnings: value in 2-3 sigma zone. Rules: 1 point outside / 2 of 3 in zone A / 4 of 5 in zone B.

Task Name: PS-4: Generate SPC control chart plots and export spc_results.csv
Observations & Analysis: spc_control_charts.png: 6 subplots with UCL/LCL/center lines. Red dots for violations. spc_results.csv / spc_limits.json as artifacts.

Task Name: PS-4: Log all PS-4 metrics to MLflow (anomaly_rate / spc_violations / spc_warnings)
Observations & Analysis: MLflow run: PS4_Anomaly_Detection. Metrics: anomalies_detected / anomaly_rate_pct / spc_total_violations / spc_total_warnings.

Task Name: PS-5: Prepare survival analysis dataset (duration / event / covariates)
Observations & Analysis: duration_days = observation period per device. event = 1 if failure observed / 0 if censored. Covariates: age / health / errors / signal / temperature.

Task Name: PS-5: Fit Weibull parametric survival model (lambda / rho estimation)
Observations & Analysis: lifelines.WeibullFitter. Estimate lambda (scale) and rho (shape). rho>1 means increasing hazard (wear-out). Reliability curves at 7/14/21/30d.

Task Name: PS-5: Generate Kaplan-Meier vs Weibull comparison plot
Observations & Analysis: km_vs_weibull.png: overlay KM empirical survival with Weibull parametric fit. Assess goodness of fit. Confidence intervals.

Task Name: PS-5: Fit Cox Proportional Hazards model (10+ covariates)
Observations & Analysis: lifelines.CoxPHFitter. Covariates: age_days / health_score / error_count_7d_mean / signal_7d_mean / temperature_7d_mean / cumulative_errors / maintenance_count.

Task Name: PS-5: Validate Cox PH assumptions (proportional hazards test)
Observations & Analysis: cox.check_assumptions(). Schoenfeld residuals test. If violated: stratify variable or use time-varying coefficients. Log test results.

Task Name: PS-5: Calculate concordance index (target >0.80)
Observations & Analysis: cox.concordance_index_. Target: >0.80. Compare against naive baseline. Log to MLflow. REJECT model if <0.75.

Task Name: PS-5: Generate hazard ratio plots and Cox risk stratification
Observations & Analysis: cox_hazard_ratios.png: forest plot of exp(coef) with 95% CI. cox_risk_stratification.png: survival curves by risk quartile.

Task Name: PS-5: Calculate Remaining Useful Life (RUL) per device
Observations & Analysis: RUL = median survival time remaining given current covariates. Risk tiers: CRITICAL(<7d) / HIGH(7-14d) / MEDIUM(14-30d) / LOW(>30d).

Task Name: PS-5: Calculate SLA breach probability per device
Observations & Analysis: P(failure within SLA window) = 1 - survival_function(SLA_days). Combine with RUL for composite sla_risk_score (0-100).

Task Name: PS-5: Export rul_estimates.csv / sla_risk_scores.csv / cox_summary.csv
Observations & Analysis: Per-device outputs: device_id / rul_median_days / survival_prob / risk_tier / sla_breach_prob / sla_risk_score. Log all as MLflow artifacts.

Task Name: PS-5: Log all PS-5 metrics to MLflow (weibull_lambda / cox_concordance / mean_rul)
Observations & Analysis: MLflow run: PS5_SLA_Risk. Metrics: weibull_lambda / weibull_rho / cox_concordance_index / mean_rul_days / reliability_7d/14d/21d/30d / high_risk_devices.

Task Name: SPRINT 5 — MLOPS MODEL MANAGEMENT & REGISTRY
Register all 5 PS models in MLflow Model Registry
Observations & Analysis: Register: PS1_Failure_Champion / PS2_Error_Patterns / PS3_Root_Cause / PS4_Anomaly_Detector / PS5_SLA_Risk. Stage: Production.

Task Name: Implement Champion/Challenger model comparison logic
Observations & Analysis: Compare new model vs current Production model. Promote only if new_metric > current_metric. Challenger stays in Staging. Auto-archive old versions.

Task Name: Build model versioning and lineage tracking
Observations & Analysis: Track: model_version / training_data_hash / feature_set_version / parent_experiment / training_timestamp. Full reproducibility chain.

Task Name: Implement Evidently AI data drift detection (DataDriftPreset)
Observations & Analysis: Evidently Report with DataDriftPreset. Compare reference (training) vs current (daily) data. drift_share threshold: 30%. HTML report output.

Task Name: Implement Evidently AI data quality monitoring (DataSummaryPreset)
Observations & Analysis: DataSummaryPreset: column stats / missing values / distribution changes. Paired with Great Expectations for comprehensive quality.

Task Name: Build drift decision logic (drift_share > 30% → trigger retraining)
Observations & Analysis: drift_decision.json output: drift_share / should_retrain / reason / timestamp. Feeds automated retraining pipeline trigger.

Task Name: Implement Great Expectations quality validation suite (Bronze/Silver/Gold)
Observations & Analysis: 3 expectation suites: Bronze (9 checks) / Silver (13 checks) / Gold (11 checks). Total: 33 expectations. quality_summary.json output.

Task Name: Build quality gate logic (pass_rate > 97% required for Gold→ML)
Observations & Analysis: Quality gate: overall_pass_rate >= 97%. If fail: block Gold→ML pipeline / alert Data Engineering / quarantine batch for investigation.

Task Name: Generate quality reports (CSV + JSON + HTML) and log to MLflow
Observations & Analysis: quality_report.csv / quality_summary.json per layer. Log to Drift_Detection MLflow experiment. Track quality trends over time.

Task Name: SPRINT 6 — AUTOMATED RETRAINING & SCHEDULING
Build daily scheduled pipeline script (daily_scheduled_pipeline.py)
Observations & Analysis: Full pipeline: Ingest→Clean→Quality→Predict(PS1-5)→Drift→Retrain_if_needed. Watermark tracking. CDC detection. 6 AM daily trigger.

Task Name: Implement watermark tracking for incremental data processing
Observations & Analysis: data/watermarks/ directory. Per-table watermark: last_processed_date / last_row_count / last_quality_score. Prevents re-processing.

Task Name: Implement CDC (Change Data Capture) detection in daily pipeline
Observations & Analysis: Detect new records (INSERT) vs updated records (UPDATE). WHERE updated_at > @watermark. Merge strategy for updates.

Task Name: Build 4 automated retraining triggers
Observations & Analysis: Trigger 1: Accuracy<90% (CRITICAL / immediate). Trigger 2: Accuracy<92% (HIGH / scheduled). Trigger 3: Drift>30% (MEDIUM). Trigger 4: 15-day cycle (LOW / routine).

Task Name: Implement 15-day training data accumulation cycle
Observations & Analysis: Daily data → training_buffer/. Every 15 days: merge buffer → full training set → retrain all PS. Track: buffer_size / days_accumulated / next_retrain_date.

Task Name: Build retraining validation pipeline (train→evaluate→compare→deploy)
Observations & Analysis: Retrain all 5 PS. Evaluate on held-out test. Compare vs current Production model. Deploy only if new > current. Auto-rollback on failure.

Task Name: Implement model A/B testing framework (Champion vs Challenger traffic split)
Observations & Analysis: Route 5% traffic to Challenger model. Compare prediction accuracy / latency / error rate over 24h. Auto-promote if Challenger wins.

Task Name: Build retraining notification system (Slack / email / MLflow tags)
Observations & Analysis: Notify on: retrain_triggered / retrain_completed / model_promoted / retrain_failed. Channels: Slack #ml-alerts / email ml-team@. MLflow run tags.

Task Name: Configure Windows Task Scheduler / Databricks Workflow for 6 AM daily run
Observations & Analysis: Local: run_daily.bat in Task Scheduler. Azure: Databricks Workflow multi-task job. Airflow alternative: daily_pipeline_dag.py.

Task Name: SPRINT 7 — API PREDICTION SERVICE & MONITORING
Build FastAPI /predict/failure endpoint (PS-1 single device)
Observations & Analysis: Load PS-1 champion model. Feature preparation from request JSON. predict_proba. Risk tier classification. Response: probability / tier / action.

Task Name: Build FastAPI /predict/anomaly endpoint (PS-4 single device)
Observations & Analysis: Load IsolationForest + scaler. decision_function score. Identify anomalous features by comparing vs population. Response: is_anomaly / score / features.

Task Name: Build FastAPI /predict/sla-risk endpoint (PS-5 single device)
Observations & Analysis: Composite SLA risk: Weibull survival + Cox hazard + RUL estimate. Response: sla_risk_score / rul_days / risk_tier / recommended_action.

Task Name: Build FastAPI /predict/batch/all endpoint (all 5 PS for multiple devices)
Observations & Analysis: Batch: 15-500 devices. Run PS1+PS2+PS3+PS4+PS5 per device. PS2: error patterns for batch. PS3: SHAP for top-risk devices. Parallel execution.

Task Name: Build FastAPI /dashboard/summary endpoint (aggregated PS results)
Observations & Analysis: Aggregate all PS outputs for React dashboard. champion_model / shap_importance / anomaly_summary / rul_estimates / drift_status / quality_metrics.

Task Name: Integrate 28 Prometheus custom metrics into API
Observations & Analysis: 5 request metrics + 6 model performance + 4 risk/business + 3 system + 3 drift + 7 process. Histogram buckets for latency / probability distributions.

Task Name: Configure Prometheus scrape targets (local + Docker)
Observations & Analysis: prometheus.yml: telemetry-api (host.docker.internal:8000) for local / telemetry-api-docker (telemetry-api:8000) for Docker. 15s scrape interval.

Task Name: Build 4 Grafana dashboards (Operations / Model / SLA / Drift)
Observations & Analysis: Operations: predictions/min / P99 latency / error rate. Model: failure_prob distribution / anomaly scores. SLA: devices_at_risk / RUL. Drift: drift_share / quality.

Task Name: Configure 7 Grafana alert rules (error_rate / latency / drift / quality / devices_at_risk)
Observations & Analysis: 7 alerts with severity. Critical: error_rate>10% / model_not_loaded. Warning: drift>30% / latency>1s / quality<90%. Notification channels.

Task Name: Implement Azure App Insights integration (SDK + KQL queries)
Observations & Analysis: opencensus-ext-azure SDK. Map all 28 Prometheus metrics → customMetrics. 20+ KQL queries for: requests / model performance / drift / system health.

Task Name: SPRINT 8 — DEPLOYMENT STRATEGIES & CI/CD
Build Docker images for API / ML-service (Dockerfile + docker-compose)
Observations & Analysis: Dockerfile: python:3.11-slim base. Multi-stage build. ~200MB image. docker-compose.yml: api + prometheus + grafana + nginx. Health checks.

Task Name: Build Blue-Green deployment configuration (docker-compose.blue-green.yml)
Observations & Analysis: Blue (current v1) + Green (new v2). Nginx weight routing. Flip: edit weights → nginx -s reload. Rollback: <30s. Zero downtime.

Task Name: Build Canary deployment configuration (gradual traffic shift)
Observations & Analysis: Nginx weight tuning: 5%→20%→50%→100% over 4 stages. Monitor at each stage. Auto-rollback if error_rate > baseline + 2%.

Task Name: Build GitHub Actions CI pipeline (lint → test → build → validate)
Observations & Analysis: 4 stages: flake8 lint / pytest / Docker build / model accuracy check. Quality gates: coverage>80% / no critical bugs / ML accuracy>90%.

Task Name: Build GitHub Actions retraining workflow (on drift webhook)
Observations & Analysis: Trigger: workflow_dispatch or webhook from drift detection. Steps: checkout → setup python → retrain → evaluate → register → deploy if better.

Task Name: Build model serving health check and readiness probes
Observations & Analysis: /health: uptime / models_loaded / last_prediction_time. /ready: all models loaded + DB connected + quality > threshold. Kubernetes-compatible.

Task Name: Implement model rollback procedure (automated + manual)
Observations & Analysis: Automated: if error_rate > 1% for 5min → rollback to previous Production model version. Manual: mlflow models transition --stage Archived.

Task Name: Build production deployment checklist (30-point validation per MARS)
Observations & Analysis: 6 categories: Code Quality (6) / ML Validation (5) / Infrastructure (6) / Data Quality (5) / Documentation (4) / Communication (4). GO/NO-GO gate.

Task Name: SPRINT 9 — TESTING & OPERATIONAL RUNBOOKS
Write unit tests for PS-1 model training (test_ps1_failure.py)
Observations & Analysis: pytest: test_data_split / test_model_accuracy / test_feature_importance / test_threshold / test_ensemble_weights. Fixtures with synthetic data.

Task Name: Write unit tests for PS-2 to PS-5 training notebooks
Observations & Analysis: test_ps2: association_rules_count / markov_stochastic. test_ps3: shap_values_shape. test_ps4: anomaly_rate_range. test_ps5: rul_positive / concordance.

Task Name: Write integration tests for daily pipeline (end-to-end)
Observations & Analysis: Test full pipeline: generate_test_data → ingest → clean → predict_all_ps → drift_check → retrain_if_needed. Assert watermark / CDC / quality gates.

Task Name: Write API integration tests for all prediction endpoints
Observations & Analysis: pytest + httpx: test_predict_failure / test_predict_anomaly / test_predict_sla_risk / test_batch_all / test_dashboard_summary. Schema validation.

Task Name: Write model performance regression tests (accuracy bounds)
Observations & Analysis: Automated tests that FAIL if: PS1 AUC < 0.90 / PS5 concordance < 0.75 / PS4 anomaly_rate > 20%. Prevents deploying degraded models.

Task Name: Build operational runbook: Model Accuracy Degradation
Observations & Analysis: Trigger: accuracy<90%. Steps: verify → check data quality → analyze drift → branch (85-90%: WARNING retrain / <85%: CRITICAL fallback model).

Task Name: Build operational runbook: Pipeline Failure (Bronze/Silver/Gold)
Observations & Analysis: Trigger: ADF/pipeline status=Failed. Steps: identify failed step → check error logs → diagnose (5 common causes) → fix → retry → escalate if >2hr.

Task Name: Build operational runbook: Drift Detected / Retraining Required
Observations & Analysis: Trigger: drift_share>30%. Steps: confirm drift (not data quality issue) → identify drifted features → run retraining → validate → deploy → monitor.

Task Name: Build operational runbook: API High Error Rate / Latency Spike
Observations & Analysis: Trigger: error_rate>1% or P95>500ms. Steps: check API logs → check model loading → check DB connections → restart if needed → scale if load.

Task Name: Build operational runbook: SLA Breach Risk / Critical Devices Alert
Observations & Analysis: Trigger: devices_at_risk>20 or critical_devices>5. Steps: validate predictions → identify devices → generate maintenance work orders → notify operations.

Task Name: Build operational runbook: Blue-Green Deployment Rollback
Observations & Analysis: Trigger: post-deploy error_rate>1% or accuracy<90%. Steps: stop traffic to Green → route 100% to Blue → verify health → investigate Green → re-deploy.

Task Name: Build operational runbook: Cache Failure / Redis Connection Issues
Observations & Analysis: Trigger: cache_hit_rate<50% or Redis connection error. Steps: check Redis health → check network → restart Redis → fallback to direct inference.
